# [Clang] Crash on `requires` keyword in expression context

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/165386
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, crash-on-invalid, concepts, confirmed, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-16T13:56:32Z

## Body

**_Generated by fuzzer_**

**clang start crashing on 17.0.1 using `-std=c++23` flag**
Reproducer: https://godbolt.org/z/4edPEWv14

Program:
```cpp
template <class C> class A{
  void f() { 
    auto result = []() constexpr {
      return requires(int x) {
        requires (x > 0) && (x < 10); 
      };
    }();  
  }
};

int main() {
  return 0; 
}
```

Stack dump:

**_Generated by fuzzer_**

**clang start crashing on 17.0.1 using `-std=c++23` flag**
Reproducer: https://godbolt.org/z/4edPEWv14

Program:
```cpp
template &lt;class C&gt; class A{
  void f() { 
    auto result = []() constexpr {
      return requires(int x) {
        requires (x &gt; 0) &amp;&amp; (x &lt; 10); 
      };
    }();  
  }
};

int main() {
  return 0; 
}
```

### Comment 2 - shafik

Assertion:

```console
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/Sema/SemaTemplateInstantiateDecl.cpp:6944:

Assertion `isa<LabelDecl>(D)' failed.
```

Goes back to clang-12: https://godbolt.org/z/7vse5c7EW
